flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gannon University rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.6k → $24.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gannon University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.5k → $40.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gannon University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 2.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gannon University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
